Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

Modified:

Modified: head/devel/p5-Agent/Makefile

--- head/devel/p5-Agent/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:03 2014	(r355383)
+++ head/devel/p5-Agent/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:04 2014	(r355384)

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Perl module that provides a foundation for software agent developers
 
+LICENSE=	ARTPERL10
+

 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
